title: Shuttleworthia dissecta
intro: Shuttleworthia dissecta, also known as shuttleworthia, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to the Himalayan region and parts of China, belonging to the family Asteraceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The bioactive constituents of shuttleworthia include triterpenoid saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its therapeutic properties. Shuttleworthia is commonly used in traditional herbal medicine preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, often combined with other herbs to enhance its benefits and improve its efficacy.
